title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
